title: Swap Home hero to building image and remove About 'Our Properties' label

requirements.summary: Update the Home page hero to use the new building-themed background image while keeping hero layout/animations/CTAs unchanged.
acceptanceCriteria: Home page hero uses a building-themed image asset path (not "/assets/Screenshot 2026-02-16 030700.png").
Hero section layout, animations, and CTA buttons remain unchanged aside from the image swap.

file_operations.description: Replace the HeroParallax imageSrc prop value from the current "/assets/Screenshot 2026-02-16 030700.png" to "/assets/generated/home-hero-building.dim_1920x1080.png" and avoid any other hero markup/styling/animation changes.

requirements.summary: Add the generated building hero image as a public static asset and ensure Home references it.
acceptanceCriteria: A new image file exists in "frontend/public/assets/generated" with the exact filename specified in imageRequirements.required.
The Home page references the new file via a public URL path (e.g., "/assets/generated/...png").

file_operations.description: Add the generated image asset file exactly named "frontend/public/assets/generated/home-hero-building.dim_1920x1080.png" (Modern real-estate building exterior hero photo, 1920x1080) so it can be referenced via a public URL path.

requirements.summary: Remove the 'Our Properties' text label from the About page featured image section without breaking layout/styling/animations.
acceptanceCriteria: The About page no longer displays the heading text "Our Properties".
The featured image section still renders correctly with consistent spacing and styling (no broken layout).

file_operations.description: Remove the featured image section heading text node "Our Properties" (the h2) while keeping the rest of the section intact (icon, card container, spacing, image, and ScrollReveal/animations).
